name: Render
philosophy: A cloud-platform surface that intentionally rejects AWS-blue defaults — deep aubergine purple over warm cream, paced like a magazine spread.

design_language.motion_signature: 200ms ease-in-out hover darken on CTAs; slow horizontal scroll-reveal on long feature scrollytells.

trademark_signals: Cream-and-aubergine pairing distinguishes Render from every blue/cyan cloud competitor
Italic weight-500 wordmark — the italic detail is the personality
Trusted-by logo strip lives on cream, never on dark
Middle pricing tier always sits on aubergine ground — one tier highlighted, never multiple
Cream-to-cream gradient fade at hero footer, never cream-to-purple
ai_slop_avoided: Don't introduce cobalt/cyan — purple is the only voltage
Don't render 3D cloud illustrations or floating geometry
Don't switch to dark mode on the marketing surface
Don't render headlines heavier than weight 500
